comment: Hovland (1937) tone-frequency generalization gradient after 1000 Hz training.
input: StimulusGeneralization(training = Pair.ForwardDelay(tone_1000hz, shock, isi=10-s, cs_duration=15-s), test_gradient = [tone_500hz, tone_750hz, tone_1000hz, tone_1250hz, tone_1500hz], training_trials = 40, test_trials = 8)
